positive: A majestic celestial fox spirit, rendered in the style of hyper-detailed neo-traditional tattoo art and Japanese woodblock prints. The fox is seated in a symmetrical, powerful pose, surrounded by swirling nebula elements, crystalline flora, and stylized moon phases. The composition must be centered and suitable for a repeating apparel pattern. Focus on extreme contrast between solid black linework, brilliant luminous points, and deep celestial blues and purples. The outlines should be crisp and clean, giving a strong silhouette quality. Minimalist yet highly intricate detailing. Golden ratio composition. Perfect symmetry.
